purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.18674147.title: THE GOSPEL OF THE MANY-FACED BRIDE Eschatological Completion of the Fear and Trembling Cycle — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18674040.title: MSBGL CHARTER v1.1 Maybe Space Baby Garden Lanes — THUMB-Type Audial Charter: Resonance Reliquary — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18674130.title: THE GÖDEL MIDRASHIM Three Texts on Incompleteness as Aperture — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18674111.title: FEAR AND TREMBLING IN LAS VEGAS: THE FRACTAL MIDRASHIM Twelve Swerve-Ordered Retellings of the Fall — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18674057.title: SPLIT THE ADAM: SONG AND PHENOMENOLOGY The Song at the Heart of Maybe Space Baby Garden Lanes — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18674069.title: OPERATOR // SWERVE + EFFECTIVE ACT Canonical Operator Definition and Canonical Inclusion — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18674101.title: FROM ATOMISM TO THE SEMANTIC CONDITION Marx, Porter, and Sharks in a Single Lineage of Material Form — Crimson Hexagon Archive

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
